title: Eugene's Tents
description: Pack your stuff and place them all immediately!
body:
What do you do when night falls and you aren't home? Put a bed and sleep on it?

What do you do when you need to stay temporarily? Dig a hole or build a dirt house?

What do you put in your inventory when you are on a trip? put crafting tables, furnaces, and chests?

Now NO MORE!

With Eugene's Tents, you can take a proper shelter IMMEDIATELY!

It only takes 5 wools and 2 sticks to craft a tent. Find a proper place(7x7x5), and right-click with your tent item, a tent structure will be generated IMMEDIATELY! It's also direction-related, no worry about placing it in the wrong way.

in the top center of the tent, you will find a Tent Knot, break it and you can retract it IMMEDIATELY!

Moreover, you can pack your stuff up with your tent! just craft your tent, crafting table, furnace, and chest together, you can get a Tent Kit! After placing the tent kit, your stuff will be placed just in the tent.
